live.title: Chetak Screen Awards
live.shortDescription: The Screen Awards is an annual Indian film and television awards ceremony that recognizes excellence in cinema and entertainment. It honors achievements across categories like acting, direction, music, and technical craft, featuring performances, celebrity appearances, and industry recognition, making it one of the prominent award events in India's entertainment calendar.
live.longDescription: The Screen Awards is an annual Indian film and television awards ceremony that recognizes excellence in cinema and entertainment. It honors achievements across categories like acting, direction, music, and technical craft, featuring performances, celebrity appearances, and industry recognition, making it one of the prominent award events in India's entertainment calendar.

live.title: West Ham United vs Leeds United - Quarter-Final - 5 Apr 2026
live.shortDescription: West Ham United take on Leeds United with a place in the semis at stake, setting up a compelling all-Premier League-style encounter. The Hammers will look to make home advantage count, while Leeds arrive intent on maintaining their cup momentum and testing West Ham’s resolve in a high-energy battle. Catch all action from the Emirates FA Cup 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.

live.title: Eintracht Frankfurt vs FC Koln - MD 28 - 5 Apr 2026
live.shortDescription: Eintracht Frankfurt face Köln as both sides look to pick up crucial points in the business end of the season. Frankfurt will aim to use home advantage to press their European ambitions, while Köln arrive determined to stay compact and challenge for a result in a high-stakes encounter. Catch all the action from Bundesliga 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.

upcoming.title: Main Woh Aur Fuji
upcoming.shortDescription: In a world where love is filtered, scored and predicted, a couple in Pune collides in a fierce, consuming romance. What begins in urgency and desire slowly fractures. Seven years later, beneath the shadow of Mount Fuji, they meet again carrying different lives, different scars, confronting a past that never truly left them. Can love survive its own history or shall it merely haunt them? Witness Lalit Prabhakar and Mrinmayee Godbole in a fresh, new-age romantic movie Main Woh Aur Fuji, streaming from 10th April, on Sony LIV.
upcoming.longDescription: In a world where love is filtered, scored and predicted, a couple in Pune collides in a fierce, consuming romance. What begins in urgency and desire slowly fractures.
